title: Task- Use Arrow Functions with Event Handlers

content.problemStatement:
Arrow Function Event Handler

Instructions:
1. Create a basic HTML structure with:
   - A button element.
   - A paragraph element.

2. Use an arrow function as the event handler to change the paragraph text when the button is clicked.



```

Note: If you need help understanding `addEventListener`, check the guide here:  
https://www.codechef.com/learn/course/web-dev-js/JSWB05/problems/JS31
